title: U Mass - Alanine Transferase
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: Load each sample into a specialized micro-sample cup for the clinical chemistry analyzer.
Select ALT test on display and run the analysis.
Perform daily quality control assessment of instrumentation before analysis.
